chapter_title.ar: بَابُ صَوْمِ الْوِصَالِ وَ صَوْمِ الدَّهْرِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 16 – The continuous Fasting, and Fasting the whole time

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/261)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/261)
text: الْوِصَالُ فِي الصِّيَامِ أَنْ يَجْعَلَ عَشَاءَهُ سَحُورَهُ .

en.hubeali: Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Hassan Bin Mahboub, from Al Halby,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said; ‘The continuation regarding the Fasting is that he makes his dinner as his pre-dawn meal’.
en.sarwar: 2. Ahmad ibn Muhammad from has narrated from al-Hassan ibn Mahbub from al-Halabiy who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Connected fasting is when one takes his dinner during Suhur (breakfast in the morning before dawn) instead.’”
